design_philosophy.core_concept: Botanical Science - bridging natural beauty with healthcare precision.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3 headings. Letter-spacing: tight. Weight: 600/700.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI text, labels. Weight: 400/500.

mono.usage: Use for product IDs, prices, code snippets.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-100 border border-emerald-200 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-emerald-500 text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-50 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium

cards.product: group bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.admin_stat: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm

inputs.default: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-200 outline-none transition-all bg-gray-50/50 focus:bg-white

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain overlay on hero sections for organic feel.

public_home.layout: Hero Section with Split View -> Featured Products (Bento Grid) -> Brand Values -> Newsletter
public_home.hero_text: Reveal Your Natural Glow. Scientifically formulated, naturally derived.
public_home.product_grid: Use a masonry or bento grid. Make the first product span 2 columns/rows for emphasis.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar Navigation (Left) -> Header (Top) -> Main Content Area
admin_dashboard.style: High density, clean lines. Avoid card backgrounds for table rows. Use distinct status badges.
admin_dashboard.colors: Use white background for content area, light gray for page background.

login.layout: Split screen: Left side image (leaves/nature), Right side form.
login.style: Clean, centered form card. Glassmorphism effect on the form container.

setup: Install required fonts: Playfair Display and Manrope via Google Fonts.
Configure Tailwind colors to match the 'colors' object.
implementation: For the Public Product Grid, ensure images have 'object-cover' and aspect ratios are consistent (e.g., aspect-[3/4] or aspect-square).
For Admin Panel, implement a protected route wrapper that checks for authentication.
Use 'framer-motion' for subtle page transitions (opacity fade-in).
accessibility: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios.
Add aria-labels to all icon-only buttons.
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-emerald-400).

do_not: DO NOT use generic gradients (e.g., standard blue-to-purple).
DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings.
DO NOT center-align long paragraphs of text.
do: DO use micro-interactions on hover (buttons lift, shadows deepen).
DO ensure mobile responsiveness for all grids (grid-cols-1 on mobile).
